zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Boleyn於1499年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，她的父親Thomas Boleyn22歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire19歲。她於1520年2月4日與William Carey在英國英格蘭倫敦格林維其結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1543年7月19日享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Boleyn于1499年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可时，她的父亲Thomas Boleyn22岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire19岁。她于1520年2月4日与William Carey在英国英格兰倫敦格林維其结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1543年7月19日享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特維。

nameMeanings.name: Boleyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Bullen  .
Flemish: derivative of the personal name Bol, from Baldwin .

variants.name: Bullen
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from the French Channel port of Boulogne, recorded in Latin sources both as Gessoriacum and as Bononia. The latter name is clearly the source of the modern placename. It is ostensibly a derivative of Latin bonus ‘good’ (compare Bolognese ), but may in fact come from a Gaulish element bona ‘foundation’. Boulogne has long been a major trading port between England and France.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Boleyn was born in 1499, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Boleyn, was 22 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire, was 19. She married William Carey on 4 February 1520, in Greenwich, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 19 July 1543, at the age of 44, and was buried in Hever, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Newry, County Down, Northern Ireland, Un: Newry, County Down, Irlande du Nord, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Boleyn est née en 1499, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Boleyn, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé William Carey le 4 février 1520, à Greenwich, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 19 juillet 1543, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Hever, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Newry, County Down, Northern Ireland, Un: Newry, County Down, Nordirland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Boleyn 1499 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Boleyn 22 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire 19. Sie hat am 4. Februar 1520 in Greenwich, London, England, United Kingdom William Carey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 19. Juli 1543 im Alter von 44 Jahren und wurde in Hever, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Boleyn è nata il nel 1499 nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Boleyn, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato William Carey il 4 febbraio 1520, nel Greenwich, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 luglio 1543, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Hever, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Boleynが1499年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Thomas Boleynは22歳，母Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshireは19歳であった。1520年2月4日にイギリスイギリスロンドングレエンウィチでWilliam Careyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1543年7月19日に44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントヘバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Boleyn(이)가 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Boleyn(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1520년 2월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 그린위치에서 William Carey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1543년 7월 19일 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 헤버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Boleyn nasceu em 1499, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Boleyn, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com William Carey em 4 de fevereiro de 1520, em Greenwich, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 19 de julho de 1543, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Hever, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Newry, County Down, Northern Ireland, Un: нюри, коунти доун, Северная Ирландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Boleyn родилась в 1499 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Boleyn было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Carey 4 февраля 1520 г. в местности гринвич, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 19 июля 1543 г. в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности хивир, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con William Carey el 4 de febrero de 1520, en Greenwich, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija.
